option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# Auth JWT_SECRET=medstore-super-secret-key-change-in-production JWT_ISSUER=medstore-backend JWT_AUDIENCE=medstore-clients JWT_ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRY=900000 JWT_REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRY=604800000
# Database DB_URL=jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/medical_supplies_db?useSSL=false&serverTimezone=Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true&characterEncoding=utf8&useUnicode=true DB_DRIVER=com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver DB_USER=root DB_PASSWORD=123456
# Cloudinary CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME=dh3lcg95f CLOUDINARY_API_KEY=599651812862278 CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET=4mJHbrrN5Mesn9xeb7uyYunHukM CLOUDINARY_FOLDER_PREFIX=medstore
# Payment environment PAYMENT_ENV=uat PAYMENT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL=https://tip-cst-rubber-metal.trycloudflare.com POS_PAYMENT_RETURN_URL=https://tip-cst-rubber-metal.trycloudflare.com/api/v1/payments/pos-return
# VNPay VNPAY_PAYMENT_URL=https://sandbox.vnpayment.vn/paymentv2/vpcpay.html VNPAY_TMN_CODE=6KXHBVDD VNPAY_SECRET_KEY=RKQDKIJ6SRH4WP6HK8LT0ISCHAEF3P3W
# MoMo UAT Configuration MOMO_PAYMENT_URL=https://uat.momo.vn/web/index.html MOMO_CREATE_URL=https://uat.momo.vn/v2/gateway/api/create MOMO_ACCESS_KEY=F8BBA842ECF85 MOMO_PARTNER_CODE=MOMO MOMO_SECRET_KEY=K951B6PE1waDMiG40xX08PDJvgGFKVlz MOMO_IPN_URL=https://tip-cst-rubber-metal.trycloudflare.com/api/v1/webhooks/momo/callback
# ZaloPay Credentials (Production) ZALO_APP_ID=2553 ZALO_KEY1=PcY4iZIKFCIdgZvA6ueMcMHHUbRLYjPL ZALO_KEY2=kLtgPl8YESDmyB01iEZFesqGcsjJM
# Endpoint - Production ZALO_ENDPOINT=https://api.zalopay.vn/v2/create

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Auth JWT_SECRET=medstore-super-secret-key-change-in-production JWT_ISSUER=medstore-backend JWT_AUDIENCE=medstore-clients JWT_ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRY=900000 JWT_REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRY=604800000
# Database DB_URL=jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/medical_supplies_db?useSSL=false&serverTimezone=Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true&characterEncoding=utf8&useUnicode=true DB_DRIVER=com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver DB_USER=root DB_PASSWORD=123456
# Cloudinary CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME=dh3lcg95f CLOUDINARY_API_KEY=599651812862278 CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET=4mJHbrrN5Mesn9xeb7uyYunHukM CLOUDINARY_FOLDER_PREFIX=medstore
# Payment environment PAYMENT_ENV=uat PAYMENT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL=https://tip-cst-rubber-metal.trycloudflare.com POS_PAYMENT_RETURN_URL=https://tip-cst-rubber-metal.trycloudflare.com/api/v1/payments/pos-return
# VNPay VNPAY_PAYMENT_URL=https://sandbox.vnpayment.vn/paymentv2/vpcpay.html VNPAY_TMN_CODE=6KXHBVDD VNPAY_SECRET_KEY=RKQDKIJ6SRH4WP6HK8LT0ISCHAEF3P3W
# MoMo UAT Configuration MOMO_PAYMENT_URL=https://uat.momo.vn/web/index.html MOMO_CREATE_URL=https://test-payment.momo.vn/v2/gateway/api/create MOMO_ACCESS_KEY=F8BBA842ECF85 MOMO_PARTNER_CODE=MOMO MOMO_SECRET_KEY=K951B6PE1waDMiG40xX08PDJvgGFKVlz MOMO_IPN_URL=https://tip-cst-rubber-metal.trycloudflare.com/api/v1/webhooks/momo/callback
# ZaloPay Credentials (Production) ZALO_APP_ID=2553 ZALO_KEY1=PcY4iZIKFCIdgZvA6ueMcMHHUbRLYjPL ZALO_KEY2=kLtgPl8YESDmyB01iEZFesqGcsjJM
# Endpoint - Production ZALO_ENDPOINT=https://api.zalopay.vn/v2/create
